title: Christmas Grinch Doll Xmas Stuffed Plush Toys Gift Santa Grinch for Home Decor Party
features: Material:The Grinch doll is made of felt fabric body and pvc fabric surface. It is long-lasting and not easy to fade
Size:Xmas stuffed plush toys is 13 inches high and 3.2 inches wide, you can put it anywhere, and it is also easy to carry
Exterior:The Grinch toy wears a hat like Santa Claus, and comes in two different colors: red and green. It is cute and interesting

Decoration:The Grinch doll ornament is the perfect addition to your home decor, you can place it on a table, in the living room, or on the Christmas tree to enhance the warm and joyful family atmosphere while also showing the holiday spirit
Gift:Christmas grinch doll brings virtual characters to life and brings joy to life. It is playful and cute, and is the holiday gift for friends and children
description: Christmas grinch doll is cute and funny, suitable for gift giving and also a great home decoration
